Vice-Chairman and Members) Rules, 1988. namely .- 1 (1) These rules may be called the Tamil Nadu Administrative Tribunal (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Service of Chainnan, Vice-Chainnan and Members) Amendment Rules, 2001. (2) They shall be deemed to have come into force on the 13th day of December, 1989. 2. In rule 8 of the Tamil Nadu Administrative Tribunal (Salaries and Allowances and CondItIOns of Service of Chaimmn, Vice-Chainnan and Members) Rules, 1988, in sub-rule (2), for the portion beginning with the words "seven hundred" and ending with the words "three thousand and five hundred per annum", the words "one thousand four hundred and fifty per annum for each completed year of service" shall be substituted. EXPLANATORY MEMORANDUM The ('-cntral Government, on the recommendations ofthe Government of Tamil Nadu has decided to revise the pension of Members of the Tamil Nadu Administrative Tribunal WIth effect from the 13th day of December, 1989. Accordingly, the Rules are being amended retrospectively with effect from 13th December, 1989. It is certified that no Member of the Tamil Nadu Administrative Tribunal is hkely to be affected advcrsely by the amendment betng given retrospective effect. IA. 11014112/99-AT] R. K. TANDON, Jt. Secy. Foot note :-Thc principal rules were notified vide number G S.R. 756(E), dated the 29th June. 1988 and subsequcntly amended vide :- (Ij) G.S.R. 1047(E), dated 13-12-1989.
